architecture: Goal-only encoder + error-guided redirection (tactic rotation, neighbor search, arithmetic escalation)

results.name: alg_subst_expand
results.ground_truth: rw [h]; ring

results.name: alg_subst_factor
results.ground_truth: rw [h]; ring

results.name: alg_cross_multiply
results.ground_truth: have h' := congrArg (fun t => t * (b * d)) h; field_simp [hb, hd] at h'; exact h'

results.name: alg_fraction_split
results.ground_truth: field_simp [hc]; ring

results.name: alg_ratio_identity
results.ground_truth: field_simp [hx, hy]

results.name: alg_complete_square
results.ground_truth: rw [h]; field_simp [ha]; ring

results.name: alg_amgm_two
results.ground_truth: have h : (x - y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith

results.name: poly_deriv_product
results.ground_truth: rw [Polynomial.derivative_mul]; rfl

results.name: poly_root_factor
results.ground_truth: apply Polynomial.dvd_iff_isRoot.mpr; rw [Polynomial.IsRoot]; exact h

results.name: poly_degree_leading_term
results.ground_truth: apply Polynomial.natDegree_add_eq_left_of_natDegree_lt; apply lt_of_lt_of_le ?_ (Nat.zero_le _); exact hp

results.name: poly_iterated_deriv
results.ground_truth: ext p; rw [Function.iterate_add, Function.comp_apply]

results.name: ana_triangle_rev
results.ground_truth: have h := abs_sub_abs_le_abs_sub x y; linarith

results.name: ana_eps_delta
results.ground_truth: have h := lt_of_lt_of_le hδ hδε; exact h

results.name: ana_cs_two_dim
results.ground_truth: nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a*y - b*x)]

results.name: ana_sum_sq_bound
results.ground_truth: have h : (x - y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith

results.name: ana_abs_prod_pos
results.ground_truth: apply abs_pos.mpr; exact mul_ne_zero hx hy

results.name: ana_sq_mono
results.ground_truth: nlinarith

results.name: ana_ratio_test
results.ground_truth: have hlt : r < 1 := hr1; linarith

results.name: ana_midpoint_bound
results.ground_truth: have hmid : (a + b)/2 - a = (b - a)/2 := by ring; have hbmid : b - (a + b)/2 = (b - a)/2 := by ring; nlinarith

results.name: ana_sum_abs_bound
results.ground_truth:
calc
  |x + y| ≤ |x| + |y| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add hx hy
  _ = 2*M := by ring

results.name: ana_bernstein_bounds
results.ground_truth: have h_base : 0 ≤ 1 - x := by linarith; have h_ub : 1 - x ≤ 1 := by linarith; constructor; exact pow_nonneg h_base (by exact_mod_cast hn0); exact pow_le_one _ h_base h_ub

results.name: era_ke_classical
results.ground_truth: nlinarith [sq_nonneg v]

results.name: era_rest_energy
results.ground_truth: nlinarith [sq_nonneg c]

results.name: era_galileo_velocity
results.ground_truth: rw [h]; ring

results.name: era_lorentz_bound
results.ground_truth: have h_sq_pos : c^2 > 0 := pow_pos hc 2; exact (div_lt_one h_sq_pos).mpr (by nlinarith)

results.name: era_photon_quantum
results.ground_truth: rw [hr]; field_simp [hh.ne.symm]

results.name: era_absolute_time
results.ground_truth: rw [h]; ring

results.name: era_time_dilation
results.ground_truth:
have h_sqrt : 0 < Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ∧ Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≤ 1 := by
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ 1 - v^2/c^2 := by
    have h_sq : v^2/c^2 < 1 := by
      have h_sq_pos : c^2 > 0 := pow_pos hc 2
      exact (div_lt_one h_sq_pos).mpr (by nlinarith)
    nlinarith
  have h_sqrt_pos : 0 < Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by nlinarith)
  have h_sqrt_le : Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≤ 1 := Real.sqrt_le_one h_nonneg
  exact ⟨h_sqrt_pos, h_sqrt_le⟩
apply (one_le_div ?_ h).mpr h_sqrt.2; exact ⟨h_sqrt.1, h⟩

results.name: era_debroglie_wavelength
results.ground_truth: rw [hp]; field_simp [hλ]

results.name: era_classical_measure
results.ground_truth: constructor; linarith; linarith

results.name: era_heisenberg_bound
results.ground_truth:
constructor
· by_contra hx; push_neg at hx; have h1 : Δx * Δp ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonpos_of_nonneg hx (by nlinarith); linarith
· by_contra hp; push_neg at hp; have h2 : Δx * Δp ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (by nlinarith) hp; linarith

results.name: logic_contrapositive
results.ground_truth: intro hnR hP; apply hnR; apply hQR; apply hPQ; exact hP

results.name: logic_cases_or
results.ground_truth: rcases h_or with (hP | hQ); exact hPQ hP; exact hQR hQ

results.name: logic_demorgan
results.ground_truth:
constructor
· intro h; by_cases hP : P; right; intro hQ; apply h; exact ⟨hP, hQ⟩; left; exact hP
· intro h hPQ; rcases hPQ with ⟨hP, hQ⟩; rcases h with (hNP | hNQ); exact hNP hP; exact hNQ hQ

results.name: logic_iff_trans
results.ground_truth: constructor; intro hP; exact hQR.mp (hPQ.mp hP); intro hR; exact hPQ.mpr (hQR.mpr hR)

results.name: logic_modus_tollens
results.ground_truth: intro hP; apply hnR; apply hQR; apply hPQ; exact hP

results.name: nt_sum_first_n
results.ground_truth:
induction' n with k ih
· simp
· rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_add, add_comm, ← add_assoc, ih]; ring

results.name: hard_quadratic_formula
results.ground_truth: have h_discr : 4*a*(a*x^2 + b*x + c) = 0 := by rw [h]; ring; nlinarith

results.name: hard_mvt_inequality
results.ground_truth: have h_diff : x^3 - y^3 = (x - y)*(x^2 + x*y + y^2) := by ring; rw [h_diff]; have h_nonpos : x - y ≤ 0 := by linarith; nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y]

results.name: hard_telescoping
results.ground_truth:
induction' n with m ih
· simp
· rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]; push_cast; ring

results.name: hard_amgm_sqrt
results.ground_truth: have h_nonneg : (Real.sqrt x - Real.sqrt y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt hx, Real.sq_sqrt hy]

results.name: hard_cubic_formula_factor
results.ground_truth: rw [hr] at h; nlinarith

results.name: hard_sq_eq_ineq_chain
results.ground_truth: have h_sq : (x - 2)^2 = 0 := by nlinarith; nlinarith

results.name: hard_poly_interp_two
results.ground_truth:
refine ⟨Polynomial.C ((y0*x1 - y1*x0)/(x1 - x0)) + Polynomial.C ((y1 - y0)/(x1 - x0)) * Polynomial.X, ?_, ?_⟩
· field_simp [hx]; ring
· field_simp [hx]; ring

results.name: hard_system_substitution
results.ground_truth: rw [h3] at h1; have hy : y = a/3 := by linarith; rw [hy] at h2; linarith

results.name: hard_abs_ineq_mul
results.ground_truth: rw [abs_mul]; have h_nonneg_a : 0 ≤ |a| := abs_nonneg _; have h_nonneg_b : 0 ≤ |b| := abs_nonneg _; nlinarith

results.name: hard_poly_remainder
results.ground_truth: rw [Polynomial.eval_sub, h, Polynomial.eval_C]; ring

results.name: alg_linear_system_v2
results.ground_truth: have hx : x = (a + b)/2 := by linarith; have hy : y = (a - b)/2 := by linarith; exact And.intro hx hy

results.name: alg_ratio_bound_v2
results.ground_truth: have h1 : a / b ≤ 1 := (div_le_one hb).mpr h; have h2 : 1 ≤ b / a := by rw [← one_le_div ha]; exact h; exact And.intro h1 h2

results.ground_truth: constructor; ring; ring

results.name: poly_degree_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; rw [Polynomial.degree_add_le]; exact le_rfl; rw [Polynomial.natDegree_add_le]; exact le_rfl

results.name: poly_deg_mul_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; rw [Polynomial.natDegree_mul hp hq]; rw [Polynomial.degree_mul]; exact rfl

results.name: poly_monic_v2
results.ground_truth: have h := Polynomial.Monic.mul hp hq; constructor; exact h; simp [hp.leadingCoeff, hq.leadingCoeff]

results.name: era_newton_gravity_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; apply div_pos; apply mul_pos; apply mul_pos; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; apply div_pos; apply mul_pos; apply mul_pos; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]

results.ground_truth: have hR := by linarith; constructor; exact hR; positivity

results.name: era_maxwell_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; rw [h]; rw [h]

results.name: era_newton_mom_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; rw [ha]; rw [ha, mul_comm]

results.name: era_classical_prob_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; linarith; linarith

results.name: era_quantum_born_v2
results.ground_truth: constructor; ring; ring

results.name: nt_dvd_trans_v2
results.ground_truth: have h_ac : a ∣ c := Nat.dvd_trans hab hbc; have h_sum : a ∣ b + c := by apply Nat.dvd_add hab h_ac; constructor; exact h_ac; exact h_sum

results.name: nt_euclid_v2
results.ground_truth: have h_or := hp.dvd_mul.mp h; rcases h_or with (hpa | hpb); left; exact hpa; right; exact hpb
